name: Padabhyanga (Foot Massage)
instructions: Massage warm sesame oil on the soles of your feet before sleep to draw energy down, calm the nervous system, and stabilize Vata.

name: Warm Ginger Water
instructions: Sip hot water with fresh ginger slices 20 minutes before meals to stimulate the digestive fire (Jatharagni) without aggravating Pitta excessively.
contraindications: Acid reflux, active ulcers, severe Pitta aggravation

name: Kapalabhati Pranayama
instructions: Perform rapid, forceful exhalations engaging the abdomen. This 'Skull Shining' breath clears morning stagnation, mucus, and lethargy.
contraindications: High blood pressure, pregnancy, hernia, severe Vata imbalance

name: Shitali Cooling Breath
instructions: Roll your tongue into a tube, inhale deeply through the mouth, and exhale through the nose. Rapidly cools mental frustration and physical heat.
contraindications: Cold weather, active respiratory congestion, high Vata

name: Digital Sunset
instructions: Turn off all glowing screens 60 minutes before bed. Use dim, warm lighting to trigger natural melatonin release and allow the subtle body to wind down.

name: Triphala Night Flush
instructions: Drink 1/2 tsp of Triphala powder steeped in warm water right before sleep to gently cleanse the GI tract and scrape toxic Ama.

name: Brahmamuhurta Wake
instructions: Wake up 90 minutes before sunrise. The atmospheric Vata brings natural lightness to the body and profound Sattvic clarity to the mind.

name: Jivha Nirlekhana
instructions: Gently scrape the tongue from back to front 7-10 times using a copper or stainless steel scraper to remove overnight metabolic waste before drinking water.

name: Gandusha (Oil Pulling)
instructions: Swish 1 tablespoon of warm sesame or coconut oil in the mouth for 10-15 minutes. Spit it out and rinse with warm water. Strengthens jaw, voice, and immunity.
contraindications: None. Do not swallow the oil.

name: Kitchari Mono-Diet
instructions: Consume only warm, well-cooked Kitchari (basmati rice, mung dal, ginger, cumin, coriander, ghee) for all meals to completely rest the digestive engine.
contraindications: Severe diabetes (consult practitioner regarding rice volume)

name: Golden Turmeric Milk
instructions: Simmer organic whole milk (or almond milk) with 1/2 tsp turmeric, a pinch of black pepper, nutmeg, and ghee. Drink warm 1 hour before bed.
contraindications: High Ama, acute Kapha congestion, strict dairy intolerance

name: Alternate Nostril Breathing
instructions: Use your right thumb and ring finger to alternate breathing between nostrils. Balances the solar and lunar channels (Ida and Pingala) of the nervous system.
